LanguageData.WULA_Addons_Antenna_Hide.label: Hidden Antenna
LanguageData.WULA_Addons_Antenna_Hide.description: A special command antenna embedded behind the head, with a unique system code. Any colonist can use this communication device to contact the Wula Empire fleet; it is a credential of the Empire's recognition of the colony.
LanguageData.WULA_AutoJumpdrive.label: Micro Teleporter
LanguageData.WULA_AutoJumpdrive.description: A micro jump-drive installed in Wula Empire synth military units, which retrieves the synth when it reaches the designated combat time.
LanguageData.WULA_AutoJumpdrive_Week.label: Micro Teleporter (Weekly)
LanguageData.WULA_AutoJumpdrive_Week.description: A micro jump-drive installed in Wula Empire synth military units, which retrieves the synth when it reaches the designated combat time.
